solution:
```
class KthLargest:

    def __init__(self, k: int, nums: List[int]):
        self.k = k
        self.nums = nums
        self.heap = []

    def add(self, val: int) -> int:
        self.heap.append(val)
        self.heapify()
        return self.heap[self.k-1]

    def heapify(self):
        self.heap = sorted(self.heap, reverse=True)[:self.k]
```
efficiency: HIGH
time complexity: O(n log n)
space complexity: O(n)
energy implications: LOW
explanation: This solution uses a heap data structure to maintain the kth largest element. The heap is updated in O(n log n) time complexity and O(n) space complexity.
